entries.summary: Fixed training notebook: correct model name, correct Quran field names, replaced gated bigcode/the-stack with open MBPP dataset.
entries.details: Notebook at P:\aura-book\backend\training\deepseek_coder_arabic.ipynb. Model: deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct. Quran: ReySajju742/Quran (columns: surah_name, verse, translation). Code: google-research-datasets/mbpp (Python problems, open). Conversation: teknium/OpenHermes-2.5 (open). All three datasets are open, no auth needed.
entries.code:
model_name = "deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-instruct"
quran = load_dataset("ReySajju742/Quran", split="train")  # verse, translation, surah_name
code_ds = load_dataset("google-research-datasets/mbpp", split="train")  # question, code
convo_ds = load_dataset("teknium/OpenHermes-2.5", split="train", streaming=True)
decisions: bigcode/the-stack is GATED - cannot use without HF login
